content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 MAIDEL LIMITED: Crypto Trader (Remote, Full Training Provided) Anywhere in the World Alabama Analytics, Data Analysis, Cryptocurrency, and Blockchain Management and Finance Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5047/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Benton <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://maidelai.com/">https://maidelai.com/</a> </p> <p><strong>Application link</strong>: <a href="https://maidelai.com/work/weworkremotely">https://maidelai.com/work/weworkremotely</a><br><br>MAIDEL LIMITED is an international company operating at the intersection of digital assets, market intelligence, and data-driven trading strategies. Our focus is on building a strong team of professionals who want to gain real-world experience in financial markets and develop practical trading expertise.<br><br>We are currently opening a Crypto Trader position for individuals who are starting their professional path and are interested in market analysis, trading and data-driven decision making.<br><br>This role combines independent trading activity with structured guidance and mentorship from experienced market specialists. We don't have strict KPI requirements, and our work is aimed at training and improving trading skills in the real cryptocurrency market. No prior professional background is required — full training is provided.<br><br><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong><br>-Execute trades across digital asset markets following established strategies and risk guidelines.<br>-Monitor market movements, liquidity flows, and price dynamics in real time.<br>-Analyze charts, indicators, and trading signals to support decision-making.<br>-Manage open positions and evaluate potential risks.<br>-Stay informed on crypto-related news and assess its market impact.<br>-Work with professional trading platforms and analytical tools.<br>-Track and evaluate personal trading performance.<br>-Continuously develop market understanding and trading skills.<br><strong>What We Offer</strong><br>-Opportunity to join a growing international company.<br>-Fully remote format — work from anywhere.<br>-Flexible schedule and workload.<br>-Work with professional trading platforms and real market data.<br>-Use of advanced analytical tools and systems.<br>-Clear development path with increasing responsibilities.<br>-Ongoing support from experienced market professionals.<br>-Practical training in working with professional trading platforms under the guidance of experienced specialists.<br><strong><br>Interview Process</strong><br>-Initial phone conversation with a company recruitment coordinator.<br>-Detailed interview with HR.<br>-Practical training session with one of our trading specialists.</p> <p><strong>Application link</strong>: <a href="https://maidelai.com/work/weworkremotely">https://maidelai.com/work/weworkremotely</a></p> <p><strong>To <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4994/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> USA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://plugingenie.com">http://plugingenie.com</a> </p> <p>I'm hiring a generalist to help run and grow our business. Our company embraces 100% remote work and flexible hours. This can be a full-time or a part-time position.</p> <p>You will get to do a lot of different things in this role:</p> <ol> <li>Customer success &amp; service: Onboarding, debugging</li> <li>Marketing content: SEO, videos</li> <li>Paid ads: AI, search</li> <li>Sales: Outreach to partners</li> <li>Review management</li> <li>One-off projects</li> </ol> <p>I'd like to hire you if you:</p> <ol> <li>Have experience with a SaaS in a technical role.</li> <li>Are self-motivated and can solve problems independently.</li> <li>Like to work on a variety of tasks.</li> <li>Have excellent written and verbal English skills.</li> <li>Live in North or South America.</li> </ol> <p>My company is called Plugin Genie. I've only recently taken over management. We sell a connector between Monday.com and Microsoft Power Automate. This connector helps businesses who use Monday.com create automations to connect with the 1,000+ tools that Power Automate can talk to. This helps companies automate tedious workflows and integrate their various systems together, while still relying on Monday.com for their collaboration and work management.</p> <p>You will be responsible for running the day-to-day operations. You'll get to interact with customers to make sure they understand it, as well as helping them with any issues that come up. You'll get to work on marketing efforts, creating articles, videos and ads. You'll have a lot of autonomy to figure out how to best approach a problem. This will be an enjoyable role for the right person.</p> <p>So, if you want to have a meaningful impact on a helpful product, and join a small, distributed team, then we should talk.</p> <p>To apply, fill out the application here: <a href="https://forms.gle/dLcMzMeq46MztMGj8">https://forms.gle/dLcMzMeq46MztMGj8</a></p> <p>Thanks,<br>Ben</p> <p>P.S. I want you to be happy working for me.
